description: Multi-turn project setup then architectural question

kbSources.name: patterns.md
kbSources.content:
The CQRS pattern separates read and write models.

Event sourcing stores all changes as events.

CQRS works well with event sourcing for complex domains.

turns.content: We are building a financial trading platform.
We need audit trails for every transaction.
Should we use CQRS with event sourcing?

description: Constraint satisfaction — find option matching all constraints

kbSources.name: cloud.md
kbSources.content:
AWS Lambda has a 15-minute timeout and 10GB memory limit.

AWS ECS supports long-running tasks with no timeout.

AWS Fargate is serverless containers with up to 30GB memory.

turns.content: Our batch job runs for 2 hours and needs 20GB RAM.
Which AWS compute service should we use?

kbSources.name: devops.md
kbSources.content:
Docker containers provide process isolation.

Kubernetes orchestrates container deployments.

Helm manages Kubernetes package deployments.

turns.content: Folosim Kubernetes in productie.
Cum facem deployment-uri?

description: Contradiction detection — user states conflicting facts

turns.content: Our server has 8GB RAM.
Our server has 16GB RAM.
How much RAM does our server have?

description: Multi-intent with context — define + compare with constraints

kbSources.name: search.md
kbSources.content:
BM25 is a lexical retrieval method based on term frequency.

Semantic search uses embeddings to find conceptually similar documents.

Hybrid search combines lexical and semantic approaches.

turns.content: We have no GPU available.
Define hybrid search and recommend whether we should use it.
Our API returns 500 errors intermittently.
It happens mostly during peak hours.
The database connection pool is set to 10.
We have 50 concurrent users at peak.
Diagnose the likely cause of the 500 errors.

kbSources.name: pricing.md
kbSources.content:
The basic plan costs $10/user/month.

The pro plan costs $25/user/month.

The enterprise plan costs $50/user/month with SLA.

turns.content: We have 100 users and need an SLA.
How much will it cost us per month?

description: Cross-language reasoning — premises in Romanian, question in English

turns.content: Toate serviciile noastre folosesc HTTPS. Serviciul de plati este un serviciu.
Does the payment service use HTTPS?

description: Evaluation with weighted criteria from session and KB

kbSources.name: dbs.md
kbSources.content:
PostgreSQL: ACID compliant, supports JSON, complex queries, 10ms avg latency.

MongoDB: document store, flexible schema, 5ms avg latency.

Cassandra: distributed, eventual consistency, 2ms avg latency.

turns.content: We need ACID compliance and latency under 15ms.
Evaluate which database fits our requirements.

description: Long conversation — 8 turns building up to a recommendation

turns.content: We are a startup with 5 developers.
Our budget is limited.
We need to ship fast.
The product is a B2B SaaS.
We expect 1000 users in the first year.
Data consistency is important.
We prefer open source tools.
The team knows JavaScript and Python.
Recommend a tech stack for us.
